title: WA16 9SJ, The Oil and Pipelines Agency: environmental permit issued – EPR/CP3643QY/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: The Oil and Pipelines Agency Installation name: Plumley PSD Permit number: EPR/CP3643QY  "
